privileged_info_summary: The update_collection_content task is a synthetic automation task in Nuxeo Platform 10.10 that requires an AI agent to manage collection contents and metadata. The task involves three specific synthetic documents (Obsolete-Logo, Logo-2024, Campaign-Overview) all pre-created in the Projects workspace. The agent must: (1) remove 'Obsolete-Logo' from the 'Brand-Assets' collection, (2) add 'Logo-2024' and 'Campaign-Overview' to the same collection, and (3) update the collection's description to exactly 'Approved brand assets for 2024 campaigns'. The task uses Nuxeo's REST API endpoints (Collection.AddToCollection automation API and NXQL search with collectionMember:collectionIds property) to manage collections. Verification is performed by querying the collection document and its members via NXQL, checking the dc:description property, and verifying the collection member list contains exactly Logo-2024 and Campaign-Overview while excluding Obsolete-Logo.
